item.title: Find JavaScript library usage
item.description: Find JavaScript Library Usage libsTracker is a free and open-source tool that helps you find JavaScript library usage from the top million websites. JavaScript library usage from the top million websites Package Name Stars Number of websites leaflet 40,095 6,994 svelte 76,689 1,601 ant-design 90,344 774 particles.js 28,419 680 material-ui 91,755 659 fabric.js 27,564 324 pixijs 42,631 222 chakra-ui 36,663 115 quasar 25,268 51

item.title: jQuery to javascript converter
item.description: jQuery to javascript converter Convert your jQuery scripts to efficient JavaScript directly in your browser. Receive reliable, chainable, modern JavaScript code instantly that can be used as a minimal utility library, while keeping your existing code untouched. View on GitHub 100% Test Coverage Generated javascript for all methods except Enter jQuery code clear fullscreen exit Convert to JavaScript JavaScript Output Copy fullscreen exit Why?

item.title: Pricing
item.description: One-time Payment Annual Subscription Hobby $19 / year For personal use. Subscribe Now For one developer For one product Can't be used in a product for sale GitHub support only Free updates while subscribed Team $49 / year For small teams. Subscribe Now For upto 8 developers For upto 5 products Can be used in a product for sale GitHub and email support Free updates while subscribed Organization $79 / year For large teams and organizations Subscribe Now For unlimited developers For unlimited products Can be used in a product for sale GitHub, Email and Skype support Free updates while subscribed Extended Commercial license If you want to include lightGallery as part of software developer kit (SDK), web application builder or website builder, downloadable or installable products like Wordpress themes, HTML templates,or something that produces copies that each use lightGallery, you need to choose the Extended Commercial license.
